channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gen Z faces biggest losses in AI economy, Goldman warns
item.description: Goldman Sachs reports positive news on AI job displacement, but a closer look reveals concerning trends.

item.title: Erin Brockovich pushes data centers for transparency
item.description: Brockovich's data center tracking project has gathered nearly 4,000 complaints across the country.

item.title: Florida sues OpenAI and Sam Altman over ChatGPT safety
item.description: Florida's attorney general claims OpenAI marketed ChatGPT while ignoring safety warnings.

item.title: Last year was a 'quiet' one for wildfires. Catastrophic blazes in Canada, South Korea and LA still made it the costliest fire year in history
item.description: The January 2025 fires in LA alone cost $140 billion in total.
